title: GPS HealthSnapshot Values
description: The 14 GPS-specific fields stored in HealthSnapshot.Values after a GPS streaming test.

gpsd_running.description: True if pgrep -x gpsd returned exit code 0 at probe start.

fix_obtained.description: True if at least one qualifying GNSS fix was received during the session.

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees from the best qualifying fix. Null if no fix obtained.

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees from the best qualifying fix. Null if no fix obtained.

altitude_m.description: Altitude above MSL in metres from the best qualifying fix. Null if no fix obtained.

utc_time.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp from the best qualifying fix. Null if no fix obtained.

satellites_used.description: Number of satellites used in the most recent fix. 0 if no SKY data received.

satellites_visible.description: Total number of satellites visible in the most recent SKY update. 0 if no SKY data received.

hdop.description: Horizontal dilution of precision from the best qualifying fix. Null if not reported.

max_snr_db.description: Maximum satellite signal strength (dBHz) from the most recent SKY update. Null if no satellites.

min_snr_db.description: Minimum non-zero satellite signal strength (dBHz) from the most recent SKY update. Null if no satellites.

speed_knots.description: Speed over ground in knots from the best qualifying fix. Null if not reported.

total_fix_updates.description: Total number of TPV JSON lines received during the session.
